<!-- AUTOGENERATED by cloud/api/cmd/gen-docs. Re-run: cd cloud/api && go run ./cmd/gen-docs -->

# API error codes

Every non-2xx response from `bright-guard` returns a JSON envelope:

```json
{ "error": { "code": "invalid_request", "message": "endpointUrl is required" } }
```

The `code` is stable and safe to switch on; the `message` is human-facing and may change. Codes are scoped to the HTTP status they were returned with.

| HTTP | Code | Meaning | Example message |
|---|---|---|---|
| 400 BadRequest | `bad_request` | Request body was not valid JSON or was missing required fields. | `bad json` |
| 400 BadRequest | `invalid_expression` | A CEL policy expression failed to compile. |  |
| 400 BadRequest | `invalid_org_id` | The `orgId` in the URL or body could not be parsed as a UUID. | `invalid orgId` |
| 400 BadRequest | `invalid_request` | Validation error in the request — e.g. malformed URL, unknown enum value. | `invalid id` |
| 401 Unauthorized | `expired` | The credential (session, device code) has expired. | `token expired` |
| 401 Unauthorized | `unauthorized` | No valid session cookie or bearer token was supplied. | `unauthorized` |
| 403 Forbidden | `denied` | Device authorization was denied by the user. | `device authorization denied` |
| 403 Forbidden | `forbidden` | Authenticated but not authorised — typically wrong org role. | `forbidden` |
| 404 NotFound | `not_found` | Resource does not exist or is not visible to this caller. | `not found` |
| 409 Conflict | `conflict` | Resource already exists or violates a uniqueness constraint. | `already resolved` |
| 409 Conflict | `name_conflict` | An object of the requested name already exists in this org. | `a policy with that name already exists` |
| 410 Gone | `expired` | The credential (session, device code) has expired. | `device code expired` |
| 422 UnprocessableEntity | `already_invited` | The target user already has a pending invitation to this org. | `An invitation is already pending for this email.` |
| 422 UnprocessableEntity | `already_member` | The target user is already a member of this org. |  |
| 422 UnprocessableEntity | `dcr_unsupported` | Upstream identity provider does not support OAuth2 Dynamic Client Registration. |  |
| 422 UnprocessableEntity | `not_registered` | Gateway credential is unknown to the control plane — re-enroll the gateway. |  |
| 428 PreconditionRequired | `authorization_pending` | Device-flow poll: user has not yet approved or denied. Retry after `interval` seconds. | `authorization pending` |
| 500 InternalServerError | `internal` | Unhandled server-side error. The request ID in the response headers is the link to logs. | `lookup failed` |
| 502 BadGateway | `upstream_failure` | An external service the control plane depends on returned an error. | `bad claims` |
| 503 ServiceUnavailable | `google_oauth_unconfigured` | Google OAuth client credentials are not set on this deployment. | `Google OAuth is not configured. Set GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.` |
| 503 ServiceUnavailable | `policy_engine_unconfigured` | The CEL policy engine failed to initialise at startup. | `policy engine not configured` |
| 503 ServiceUnavailable | `scheduler_unconfigured` | The background scheduler is not running (typically only in test builds). | `scheduler not configured` |

_Generated 2026-05-20 by scanning every `writeError(...)` call under `cloud/api/internal/api/` and `cloud/api/internal/auth/`._
